methodology.title: Data Methodology
methodology.subtitle: Learn about our price aggregation algorithms and risk assessment framework

aggregation.title: Price Aggregation
aggregation.description: Multi-source data fusion and price calculation
aggregation.intro: We employ multiple price aggregation algorithms that dynamically select the optimal approach based on data quality and market conditions, ensuring price accuracy and manipulation resistance.

simpleAverage.title: Simple Average
simpleAverage.description: Arithmetic mean of all valid data source prices, suitable for scenarios where data sources have similar quality.

weightedAverage.title: Weighted Average
weightedAverage.description: Assigns weights based on liquidity, trading volume, and historical accuracy of each data source for more accurate market price reflection.

median.title: Median
median.description: Takes the middle value of all prices, effectively resisting extreme values and anomalous data.

trimmedMean.title: Trimmed Mean
trimmedMean.description: Calculates average after removing highest and lowest percentages, balancing advantages of mean and median.

riskAssessment.title: Risk Assessment
riskAssessment.intro: Our risk assessment framework analyzes oracle data risk from multiple dimensions, helping users identify potential issues and make informed decisions.

centralization.title: Centralization Risk
centralization.description: Evaluates the decentralization level of data providers; higher concentration means greater risk.

freshness.title: Data Freshness Risk
freshness.description: Evaluates data update frequency and timeliness; stale data may lead to poor decisions.

deviation.title: Price Deviation Risk
deviation.description: Monitors price differences between data sources; abnormal deviations may indicate market manipulation or technical issues.

liquidity.title: Liquidity Risk
liquidity.description: Evaluates underlying market liquidity conditions; low liquidity may cause price distortion.

dataQuality.title: Data Quality
dataQuality.intro: We have established a complete data quality management system that continuously monitors and evaluates data quality from multiple dimensions.

completeness.title: Completeness
completeness.description: The completeness of data records, including field completeness and time series continuity.

accuracy.title: Accuracy
accuracy.description: The closeness of data to true values, assessed through multi-source comparison and historical validation.

consistency.title: Consistency
consistency.description: Consistency of data across different times and sources; abnormal fluctuations may indicate data issues.

timeliness.title: Timeliness
timeliness.description: The time delay from data generation to availability, particularly important for high-frequency trading scenarios.

confidenceScore.title: Confidence Score
confidenceScore.intro: We use a comprehensive scoring model to calculate the confidence level of each data point, helping users assess data reliability.

dataSources.title: Data Sources & Verification
dataSources.intro: Our data comes from multiple tiers of sources, each with different verification requirements and credibility levels.
dataSources.primaryDesc: Directly from top-tier exchanges and official oracle networks, rigorously verified
dataSources.secondaryDesc: From reputable data aggregators and verified nodes, reliable quality
dataSources.tertiaryDesc: From community nodes and supplementary sources, for reference and cross-validation

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: The methodology provided on this page is for technical reference only. Actual data processing methods may be adjusted based on market conditions and technological developments. We are not responsible for any losses resulting from the use of data from this platform.
